channel.title: GitHub AI Ranking Changes (Top 10)
channel.description: Track changes in GitHub AI repository rankings (Top 10 per category)

item.title: [RAG] llm-app
item.description:
📉 Rank: #9 → #10 (↓1)
Ready-to-run cloud templates for RAG, AI pipelines, and enterprise search with live data. 🐳Docker-friendly.⚡Always in sync with Sharepoint, Google Drive, S3, Kafka, PostgreSQL, real-time data APIs, and more.
Language: Jupyter Notebook
Category: RAG Stars: 60,010 | Forks: 1,431

item.title: [RAG] claude-mem
item.description:
🆕 NEW ENTRY - Ranked #9 in RAG
A Claude Code plugin that automatically captures everything Claude does during your coding sessions, compresses it with AI (using Claude's agent-sdk), and injects relevant context back into future sessions.
Language: TypeScript
Category: RAG Stars: 60,320 | Forks: 4,979

item.title: [OpenAI] ragflow
item.description:
📈 Rank: #10 → #9 (↑1)
RAGFlow is a leading open-source Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) engine that fuses cutting-edge RAG with Agent capabilities to create a superior context layer for LLMs
Language: Python
Category: OpenAI Stars: 78,295 | Forks: 8,833

item.title: [OpenAI] hermes-agent
item.description:
📈 Rank: #9 → #8 (↑1) | ⭐ Stars: 90,717 → 94,556 (+3,839)
The agent that grows with you
Language: Python
Category: OpenAI Stars: 94,556 | Forks: 13,196

item.title: [OpenAI] vllm
item.description:
🆕 NEW ENTRY - Ranked #10 in OpenAI
A high-throughput and memory-efficient inference and serving engine for LLMs
Language: Python
Category: OpenAI Stars: 77,005 | Forks: 15,721

item.title: [LLM] everything-claude-code
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 157,730 → 158,917 (+1,187)

Language: JavaScript

item.title: [ChatGPT] LLMs-from-scratch
